name: Pipedream MCP
description: Pipedream's MCP server exposes 2,400+ app integrations as tools for AI agents — connect Slack, GitHub, databases, and APIs without writing integration code.

skills.name: App Integrations
skills.description: Access 2,400+ pre-built app integrations as MCP tools with managed OAuth credentials

skills.name: Workflow Trigger
skills.description: Trigger Pipedream workflows from an AI agent and receive structured step results

skills.name: Data Transform
skills.description: Run data transformation steps between API calls without writing glue code

skills.name: Event Sources
skills.description: Subscribe to real-time event streams from apps like GitHub, Stripe, and Slack

skills.name: Credential Management
skills.description: Reuse stored OAuth tokens and API keys across workflows without re-authenticating
